channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: French Parliament's committee approves social media ban for under-15s
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- France Will Ban Social Media For Children Under 15
- France lawmakers pass law banning social media for children under 15; first EU nation to do so
- French Parliament passes bill banning social media use for children under 15
- French parliament passes social media ban for under-15s
- France bans social media for under-15s
- France becomes the first EU country to ban social media for children
- France bans social media for under-15s
- French parliament passes bill banning social media use by minors under 15
- Another Major Country Bans Children From Social Media
- French Lawmakers Adopt Pioneering Social Media Ban For Children Under 15
- France Becomes 1st EU Country to Bar Children Under 15 From Social Media
- French lawmakers adopt a sweeping social media ban for children under 15
- French lawmakers approve a sweeping social media ban for children under 15
- French lawmakers approve social media ban for children
- France’s parliament approves social media ban for children under 15, in EU first
- France first European country to ban social media access for under-15s
- French parliament backs social media ban for children under 15
- 'No more social media before 15': France passes landmark digital age law
- French lawmakers adopt a sweeping social media ban for children under 15
- French lawmakers vote on social media ban for children
- France Is Poised to Restrict Social Media for Children
- France Is Poised to Restrict Social Media for Children
- 'France wants to lead the way' with under-15s social media ban
- France advances bill to ban social media for under-15s
- French lawmakers vote on social media ban for children
- French Lawmakers Expected To Approve Social Media Ban For Under-15s
- Countries Move To Ban Social Media For Children
- Countries move to ban social media for children
- French youth social media ban meets age check conundrum
- France likely to become first EU nation to approve social media ban for under-15s
- French parliament's committee approves social media ban for under-15s]]>
